Offense_Classification: Unclassified/Hybrid Felony (The penalty is linked directly to the maximum confinement period of the underlying felony).
DOC_Seriousness_Level: Level 8 or 9 (Variable; determined dynamically by the underlying felony tier).
Max_Jail_Prison_Time: Underlying Max Confinement plus up to 15 additional years (Per Wis. Stat. § 940.03 sentence formula).
Max_Financial_Fine: Matches the maximum statutory fine permitted by the specific underlying felony.
Release_Parole_Tier: Restructured under TIS; must serve 100% of the initial term of confinement specified by the judge before moving to Extended Supervision.
Probation_Eligible: Restricted (While court holds technical jurisdiction, sentencing guidelines strongly presume or require confinement based on the underlying predicate crime).
Mandatory_Minimum: None (Presumed floor determined by the predicate felony offense).
Work_Release_Eligible: Conditional (Pre-release transition phases within minimum security only).
Expungement_Eligible: No (Wis. Stat. § 973.015 explicitly excludes all lethal and high-level offenses).
Pardon_Eligible: Yes (Via application to the Governor of Wisconsin).
Firearm_Rights_Restoration: No (Lifetime felony firearm ban under Wis. Stat. § 941.29).
Voting_Rights_Restored: Automatic upon absolute discharge/completion of full sentence (confinement + extended supervision).
Juvenile_Sealing_Avail: No (If waived to adult court, record is permanent).
License_Impact: Permanent statutory revocation/bar for healthcare, fiduciary, corporate leadership, and public safety positions.
BTB_Status: Excluded (Felonies involving homicide are exempt from Ban-the-Box screening protections).
Collateral_Raw_Summary: Lifetime loss of firearm rights; denial of public housing; absolute employment bars in all caregiver and public sectors; deportable aggravated felony track.
Collateral_Firearms: Absolute lifetime ban under Wis. Stat. § 941.29 and federal 18 U.S.C. § 922(g)(1).
Collateral_Immigration: Classified as an Aggravated Felony and a Crime Involving Moral Turpitude (CIMT); triggers mandatory deportation under INA § 237.
Collateral_Voting: Right to vote is suspended while incarcerated or on Extended Supervision; restored only upon absolute discharge.
Collateral_Housing: Ineligible for federal housing programs, Section 8 assistance, and public housing authorities based on violent offense screening guidelines.
Collateral_Registry: State Definition Dependent (Triggers automatic placement on the Sex Offender Registry if the underlying predicate felony was a qualified Sexual Assault).
Collateral_Employment: Permanent direct bar from all public sector, law enforcement, corporate governance, education, and healthcare facility employment.
Reportable_Scope: Lifetime reportable (Conviction); Lifetime loss of firearm rights; denial of public housing; absolute employment bars in all caregiver and public sectors; deportable aggravated felony track.

Group_Category: Group 12: Operational, Administrative, and Pre-Adjudication Records
Record_Type: Pre-Adjudication Warrant Record / Law Enforcement Alert
Offense_Description: Active Arrest Warrant (Felony Homicide Nexus)—A judicially authorized order commanding law enforcement to arrest a named individual based on a showing of probable cause for a homicide or related felony offense.
Offense_Classification: Pre-Adjudication Order (Inherits the classification tier of the underlying charge, up to Class A Felony)
Max_Jail_Prison_Time: N/A (Custodial detention authorized indefinitely pending initial court appearance)
Max_Financial_Fine: None for the warrant itself
PAA_Release_Tier: Pre-Trial Detention / High Flight Risk Tier
Release_Parole_Tier: No parole eligibility; release is governed strictly by pre-trial cash bond or absolute non-bailable hold orders.
Prison_Eligible: No (Pre-trial confinement restricted to county jail infrastructure)
Electronic_Monitoring: Conditional (May be ordered if a high-cash bond is posted with GPS tracking conditions)
Sealing_Eligible: No (Active warrants are published via NCIC and state law enforcement networks)
Expungement_Eligible: No
Pardon_Eligible: No
Firearm_Rights_Restoration: No (Active felony warrant triggers immediate federal firearm disability under 18 U.S.C. § 922(g)(2))
Voting_Rights_Restored: Intact under Wisconsin law unless actively serving a felony sentence (but practically restricted by incarceration)
License_Impact: Immediate administrative suspension of driving privileges and professional licenses upon integration into NCIC.
BTB_Status: Excluded (Active warrants completely bypass all Ban-the-Box screening protections)
Collateral_Raw_Summary: Active federal and state firearm disability; immediate arrest upon law enforcement contact; suspension of public benefits and professional licenses.
Collateral_Firearms: Absolute ban under federal 18 U.S.C. § 922(g)(2) for fugitives from justice.
Collateral_Immigration: Triggers immediate ICE notification and potential detainer deployment if flagged in public safety databases.
Collateral_Voting: Legally intact but physically obstructed if held in pre-trial detention without access to absentee balloting.
Collateral_Housing: Direct cause for immediate termination of public assistance, Section 8 benefits, and private lease agreements.
Collateral_Registry: No (Unless integrated into specialized tracking systems for high-risk fugitives)
Collateral_Employment: Immediate ground for termination or denial across all sectors; mandatory disclosure required on standard background screenings.
Reportable_Scope: Indefinitely reportable while active (Pre-Adjudication Order); Active federal and state firearm disability; immediate arrest upon law enforcement contact; suspension of public benefits and professional licenses.

Group_Category: Group 12: Operational, Administrative, and Pre-Adjudication Records
Record_Type: Law Enforcement Arrest Log / Fingerprint Submission Entry
Offense_Description: Arrest Record for Serious Felony / Homicide Nexus—The physical taking of a person into custody by a law enforcement officer based on probable cause, generating a permanent state tracking entry prior to formal court adjudication.
Internal_Screening_Tier: Tier 2 (Very High Risk on commercial screenings due to charge nature)
Violent_Offense: State Definition Dependent (Based entirely on the alleged offense category)
Max_Jail_Prison_Time: None (Statutory maximums apply only upon a finding of guilt)
Jail_Only: Yes (Temporary holding in local municipal or county facilities pending bond)
Electronic_Monitoring: Conditional (Frequently deployed as a condition of pre-trial monitoring)
Sealing_Eligible: No (Wisconsin does not automatically seal non-conviction arrest records)
Expungement_Eligible: Yes (Under Wis. Stat. § 165.845, if charges are dismissed, not filed, or acquitted, the individual may petition the Crime Information Bureau to purge fingerprints and photos)
Pardon_Eligible: No (Pardons apply strictly to final criminal convictions)
Firearm_Rights_Restoration: Yes (Intact unless indictments or active bail conditions explicitly restrict possession)
Voting_Rights_Restored: Intact (Pre-trial detainees maintain full voting eligibility in Wisconsin)
Juvenile_Sealing_Avail: Yes (Automatic if processed under juvenile jurisdiction codes)
License_Impact: Discretionary suspension by professional licensing boards pending final court adjudication.
BTB_Status: Protected (Wisconsin fair employment law forbids discrimination based on arrest records unless substantial relationship exists to employment)
Collateral_Raw_Summary: Potential fingerprint registry purge eligibility; clear background screen visibility; strict employer relationship restrictions under state employment law.
Collateral_Firearms: Subject to emergency surrender if ordered as a formal condition of pre-trial release.
Collateral_Immigration: Arrest entries trigger immediate federal notification; may impact processing for green cards, visas, or naturalization tracks.
Collateral_Voting: Retained; individual may execute voting privileges via jail-administered absentee ballots.
Collateral_Housing: Commercial property managers regularly screen for violent arrest records, resulting in heightened denial rates.
Collateral_Employment: Regulated by Wis. Stat. § 111.335; employers cannot deny employment based on arrest unless the offense closely relates to the specific job duties.
Reportable_Scope: 7-year reportable limit (Non-Conviction Arrest Log); Potential fingerprint registry purge eligibility; clear background screen visibility; strict employer relationship restrictions under state employment law.

Group_Category: Group 5: Vehicular Crimes / Civil Traffic Violations
Record_Type: Civil Traffic Citation / DOT Administrative Finding
Offense_Description: Refusal to Submit to Chemical Testing (Implied Consent Violation)—An administrative and civil infraction occurring when a driver refuses an officer's lawful request for a breath, blood, or urine sample under a vehicular homicide or OWI investigation.
Internal_Screening_Tier: Tier 3 (Moderate-High Severity due to mandatory multi-year license revocations)
Max_Jail_Prison_Time: None (Incarceration is statutorily unavailable for first-instance civil refusals)
Max_Financial_Fine: $300 (Processed as a civil traffic forfeiture, exclusive of court assessments)
Mandatory_Minimum: None (Incarceration baseline is zero)
Sealing_Eligible: No (Civil traffic records remain visible on open Wisconsin CCAP portals)
Expungement_Eligible: No (Wis. Stat. § 973.015 applies strictly to criminal code sentences)
Pardon_Eligible: No (Gubernatorial pardons do not apply to civil traffic or administrative infractions)
Firearm_Rights_Restoration: Intact (No impact on firearm privileges under state or federal law)
Voting_Rights_Restored: Intact (Civil infractions carry no impact on voting status)
Juvenile_Sealing_Avail: Yes (If adjudicated inside local juvenile or municipal courts)
License_Impact: Mandatory 1-year to 3-year revocation of driving privileges; mandatory 30-day absolute waiting period for an occupational license; mandatory Ignition Interlock Device (IID).
BTB_Status: Protected (Civil infractions are not criminal convictions and are barred from standard employment screens)
Consequence_Severity: 3 (Moderate Severity based on commercial driving exclusions)
Collateral_Raw_Summary: Mandatory multi-year driver's license revocation; immediate Commercial Driver's License (CDL) disqualification; mandatory installation of ignition interlock device.
Collateral_Firearms: No impact under state or federal gun regularities.
Collateral_Immigration: Minimal risk; pure civil refusal without an underlying criminal conviction does not constitute a deportable class offense.
Collateral_Voting: Unaffected.
Collateral_Housing: No impact on standard public housing or Section 8 voucher eligibility.
Collateral_Employment: Causes an immediate, mandatory 1-year disqualification of Commercial Driver's Licenses (CDL), triggering a temporary or permanent bar from commercial logistics employment.
Reportable_Scope: 7-year reportable limit (Civil Traffic Forfeiture); Mandatory multi-year driver's license revocation; immediate Commercial Driver's License (CDL) disqualification; mandatory installation of ignition interlock device.
